meta.title: Cloudflare SaaS Starter
meta.description: Production-ready full-stack TypeScript starter for Cloudflare Workers — React Router v7, tRPC, Better Auth, Drizzle, Effect TS, and an agent harness so AI coding tools don't drift.

hero.title_lead: A serious starting point for your next
hero.description: Auth, admin dashboard, file upload to R2, analytics, dark mode, i18n — all wired with Effect TS, tRPC, and Drizzle. Fork it, rip out what you don't need, and ship.

wired.title: What's already wired
wired.subtitle: Each card links into a route or surface in this repo. Nothing here is a stub — these features are live and tested.

auth.title: Email + password auth
auth.description: Better Auth with role-based access (user / admin) and a ban system, persisted in D1 via Drizzle.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.description: Role-gated /admin route with user management, ban controls, and analytics — gated through tRPC adminProcedure.

upload.title: File upload to R2
upload.description: Server-side multipart upload through /api/upload-file, hitting Cloudflare R2 via a typed BucketRepository.

analytics.title: Read-only analytics
analytics.description: User growth, role + verification distribution, recent signups — all queried with parallel Effect.all in a repository.

effect.title: Effect TS programming model
effect.description: Tagged errors, Effect.Service repositories, Effect.Schema validation. No Zod, no try/catch, fully typed errors mapped to tRPC.

i18n.title: i18n out of the box
i18n.description: remix-i18next wired into loaders + client. Add a locale by dropping a JSON file under app/locales/<lng>.

harness.title: An agent harness, not just a stack
harness.subtitle: v2 ships with the scaffolding around the LLM — instructions, state, verification, scope, and lifecycle — so coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) stay coherent across sessions instead of regressing every time the context window fills.

brain.title: Brain
brain.description: Layered docs the agent reads before touching code. High-level architecture, codebase patterns, 7 layer-aligned rules, per-feature memory, and run notes.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.description: Step-by-step runbooks for the common moves — add a tRPC endpoint, a DB table, a tagged error, a CF binding. Bookended by 00-before-task and 99-verify-done.

gates.title: Verification gates
gates.description: Slash commands that run typecheck, tests, e2e, brain coherence, and harness invariants. The agent can't claim done until every gate is green.

quickstart.title: Quickstart
quickstart.subtitle: Three commands and you have a working dev server, a local D1, and the marketing site you're looking at right now.
